title: Purpose in Action
description: Clarity about why you act — skill in action, purpose beyond status, and release of fruit-obsession.
entry_queries: why am I doing this work
I feel lost about my path

steps.practice: Give your full attention to today's effort, and postpone judging success until the work is complete.
steps.reflection: Where am I attaching my happiness to the outcome — and calling it high standards?

steps.practice: Write the purpose of your work beyond salary or status.
steps.reflection: Where has chasing reward made my work smaller than it could be?

steps.practice: Choose one task and do it with full attention for twenty minutes.
steps.reflection: What would 'skill in action' look like in my hardest task this week?
